import json, re, unicodedata, itertools, textwrap, os, sys, math, difflib, collections, pandas as pd

def load_json(path):
    with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        return json.load(f)

quran = load_json(quran_path)
hadith = load_json(hadith_path)

import re, unicodedata

def normalize_ar(text):
    if text is None:
        return ""
    # remove tashkeel
    tashkeel = re.compile(r'[\u0617-\u061A\u064B-\u0652\u0657-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')
    text = tashkeel.sub('', text)
    # remove tatweel and punctuation
    text = re.sub(r'[\u0640\u061F\u060C\u061B!"\'\(\)\[\]\{\}\-–—…,\.،؛:؟»«ـ]', ' ', text)
    # unify hamza forms
    text = (text.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
                 .replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ة','ه'))
    # collapse spaces
    text = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', text).strip()
    return text

target_full = "خسف بأصحاب الفيل، ومسخ الطير بأهل بدر، ومسخ القردة والخنازير من المشركين"
norm_target = normalize_ar(target_full)
norm_target
